dict.string: With "Film dashboard" or "Capture stills" enabled, CAN-Rosetta uses the rear camera to record the dashboard (video and/or periodic full-resolution photos) so it can later be read (OCR) as ground truth for signals the OBD port does not expose.
CAN-Rosetta connects to the AutoPi over its local Wi-Fi access point to start investigations and coordinate recording. No data leaves the local network.
CAN-Rosetta keeps recording GPS in the background so a drive is captured even when the screen is off or the phone is docked in a cradle.
CAN-Rosetta records GPS position, speed and course while you drive, as ground-truth for aligning and decoding the vehicle's CAN bus.
CAN-Rosetta records accelerometer, gyroscope and attitude while you drive. These motion samples are the known reference used to decode the vehicle's CAN bus.
